• Show All Code
  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Landsim analysis for the Pereira et al. (2025) Adv Eco Res

Remove old PopIn

remove.packages("PopIn")
#.libPaths()

Install and load the library PopIn.

remotes::install_local("/Users/henrique/Documents/Programming/labprojects/PopIn", force=TRUE)

These packages have more recent versions available.
It is recommended to update all of them.
Which would you like to update?

1: All                         
2: CRAN packages only          
3: None                        
4: Rcpp (1.1.0 -> 1.1.1) [CRAN]
3
* checking for file ‘/private/var/folders/nd/zx689k515nd7_f3mx8_561cr0000gn/T/RtmpFuU9Ql/file1415675c4628c/PopIn/DESCRIPTION’ ... OK
* preparing ‘PopIn’:
* checking DESCRIPTION meta-information ... OK
* cleaning src
* checking for LF line-endings in source and make files and shell scripts
* checking for empty or unneeded directories
Removed empty directory ‘PopIn/debug_landsim/debug_landsim.xcodeproj/project.xcworkspace/xcshareddata/swiftpm/configuration’
Removed empty directory ‘PopIn/debug_landsim/debug_landsim.xcodeproj/project.xcworkspace/xcshareddata/swiftpm’
Removed empty directory ‘PopIn/debug_landsim/debug_landsim.xcodeproj/project.xcworkspace/xcshareddata’
* building ‘PopIn_1.0.tar.gz’

Load the library PopIn and the fractal landscape generating function..

library(PopIn)
source("FractalLandscape.R")

Now try an example.

indmodel()
start.time =  Thu Jan 15 16:14:11 2026 
end.time =  Thu Jan 15 16:14:11 2026 
 
$popsize_av_end
[1] 23.5

$prob_ext
[1] 0.5

$prob_persist
[1] 0.5

$time_ext_av
[1] 141.5

$popsizematrix

Small home-range size

land2 = generate_fractal_landscape(0.2, .01,20)
image(land2)

indmodel(land_r=land2, param = list(
  n_rep = 40, hab_aff = c(1.0, 0.1), n_steps = 60, init_population = 10,
  hr_size = 1, birth_rate = 2.0, breeding_age = 1, survival = 0.4, 
  distance_weight = 0.001, dispersal_distance = 0, dispersal_mode = 0,
  sink_avoidance = 0, neigh_avoidance = 0, sink_mortality = 0, 
  plotYN = "TRUE", writeYN = "TRUE", 
  dir_name = "Res_indmodel", file_name = "small"))
start.time =  Thu Jan 15 17:24:13 2026 
end.time =  Thu Jan 15 17:24:14 2026 
 
$popsize_av_end

$prob_persist

Large home-range size fragmented.

landfrag = generate_fractal_landscape(0.2, .01,160)
image(landfrag, asp=1)

indmodel(land_r=landfrag, param = list(
  n_rep = 40, hab_aff = c(1.0, 0.1), n_steps = 60, init_population = 10,
  hr_size = 64, birth_rate = 2.0, breeding_age = 1, survival = 0.4, 
  distance_weight = 0.001, dispersal_distance = 0, dispersal_mode =0 ,
  sink_avoidance = 0, neigh_avoidance = 0, sink_mortality = 0, 
  plotYN = "TRUE", writeYN = "TRUE", 
  dir_name = "Res_indmodel", file_name = "large_fragmented"))
start.time =  Thu Jan 15 18:41:15 2026 
end.time =  Thu Jan 15 18:41:33 2026 
 
$popsize_av_end

$prob_ext
[1] 0.05

$prob_persist

Large home-range size unfragmented (K=400).

land2 = generate_fractal_landscape(0.2, .99,160)
image(land2, asp=1)

indmodel(land_r=land2, param = list(
  n_rep = 40, hab_aff = c(1.0, 0.1), n_steps = 60, init_population = 10,
  hr_size = 64, birth_rate = 2.0, breeding_age = 1, survival = 0.4, 
  distance_weight = 0.001, dispersal_distance = 0, dispersal_mode =0 ,
  sink_avoidance = 0, neigh_avoidance = 0, sink_mortality = 0, 
  plotYN = "TRUE", writeYN = "TRUE", 
  dir_name = "Res_indmodel", file_name = "large_unfrag"))

Large home-range size random (K=400).

land2 = matrix(runif(160*160),160,160);
land2 = ConvertToLandscape(land2,.2)
image(land2, asp=1)

indmodel(land_r=land2, param = list(
  n_rep = 40, hab_aff = c(1.0, 0.1), n_steps = 60, init_population = 10,
  hr_size = 64, birth_rate = 2.0, breeding_age = 1, survival = 0.4, 
  distance_weight = 0.001, dispersal_distance = 0, dispersal_mode =0 ,
  sink_avoidance = 0, neigh_avoidance = 0, sink_mortality = 0, 
  plotYN = "TRUE", writeYN = "TRUE", 
  dir_name = "Res_indmodel", file_name = "large_random"))

Mechanistic home-range size unfragmented.

land2 = generate_fractal_landscape(.2, .99,160)
image(land2, asp=1)

indmodel(land_r=land2, param = list(
  n_rep = 40, hab_aff = c(1.0, 0.1), n_steps = 60, init_population = 10,
  hr_size = 0, birth_rate = 2.0, breeding_age = 1, survival = 0.4, 
  distance_weight = 0.001, dispersal_distance = 0, dispersal_mode =0 ,
  sink_avoidance = 0, neigh_avoidance = 0, sink_mortality = 0, 
  plotYN = "TRUE", writeYN = "TRUE", 
  dir_name = "Res_indmodel", file_name = "indmodel_rep"))

Mechanistic home-range size random

  land2 = matrix(runif(160*160),160,160);
  land2 = ConvertToLandscape(land2,.2)
  indmodel(land_r=2, param = list(
  n_rep = 40, hab_aff = c(1.0, 0.1), n_steps = 60, init_population = 10,
  hr_size = 0, birth_rate = 2.0, breeding_age = 1, survival = 0.4, 
  distance_weight = 0.001, dispersal_distance = 0, dispersal_mode =0 ,
  sink_avoidance = 0, neigh_avoidance = 0, sink_mortality = 0, 
  plotYN = "TRUE", writeYN = "TRUE", 
  dir_name = "Res_indmodel", file_name = "mechanistic_fragmented"))
Error in mapvalues(land_r, sort(unique(as.vector(land_r))), hab_aff[1:length(hab_aff)]) : 
  `from` and `to` vectors are not the same length.

Mechanistic home-range size fragmented. 10% good habitat

land2 = generate_fractal_landscape(0.1, .01,160)
image(land2, asp=1)

indmodel(land_r=land2, param = list(
  n_rep = 2, hab_aff = c(1.0, 0.1), n_steps = 60, init_population = 10,
  hr_size = 0, birth_rate = 2.0, breeding_age = 1, survival = 0.4, 
  distance_weight = 0.001, dispersal_distance = 0, dispersal_mode =0 ,
  sink_avoidance = 0, neigh_avoidance = 0, sink_mortality = 0, 
  plotYN = "TRUE", writeYN = "NO"))
